tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_commit_with_description_exists
tests.trace:
def test_commit_with_description_exists():
        result = subprocess.run(
            [
                "jj", "log", "--no-graph",
                "-r", 'description("infra: add terraform s3 backend configuration")',
            ],
            cwd=REPO_DIR,
            capture_output=True,
            text=True,
        )
        assert result.returncode == 0, (
            f"jj log failed: {result.stderr}"
        )
>       assert len(result.stdout.strip()) > 0, (
            "No commit found with description 'infra: add terraform s3 backend configuration'"
        )
E       AssertionError: No commit found with description 'infra: add terraform s3 backend configuration'
E       assert 0 > 0
E        +  where 0 = len('')
E        +    where '' = <built-in method strip of str object at 0xb3b3f0>()
E        +      where <built-in method strip of str object at 0xb3b3f0> = ''.strip
E        +        where '' = CompletedProcess(args=['jj', 'log', '--no-graph', '-r', 'description("infra: add terraform s3 backend configuration")'], returncode=0, stdout='', stderr='').stdout
